summary.intent: Build a live React Native/Expo web app and Express+WebSocket API server for the Gossamer project to visualize Claude Code sessions and events from SQLite in real-time, with a rich event timeline UI.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented: backend `serve` subcommand, three API routes, WebSocket push, and an Expo web app with ActiveSessions table, SessionDetail event timeline, and SessionTree screens — plus iterative UI polish (column alignment, keyword chips, collapsing tool groups, markdown rendering, bidirectional session links, cosmetic tweaks).

repo: When plan mode is approved, Claude Code fires SessionEnd for the plan session and SessionStart for the new implementation session, but never fires UserPromptSubmit for the approval message — cannot be hooked.
Plan→Implementation session linking uses a 30-second heuristic: detect SessionEnd + SessionStart in the same cwd within 30s and set parentSessionId via state.agentParents.
SubagentStart hook events carry the child session ID directly and are the cleanest link source, but were not yet firing in this DB (hook may not be configured in settings.json).
The `updatedAt` field backfilled by reconstruct reflects last DB write time, not actual session end — can cause false-positive time-overlap parent detection.
Dynamic import of server.ts in the serve subcommand prevents express/ws from loading on every hook invocation.
NodeNext module resolution requires `.js` extensions on all local imports in src/server.ts.

code.finding: Two-pass groupEvents(): first pass pairs PreToolUse+PostToolUse by tool_use_id into merged toolUse items; second pass collapses consecutive toolUse and Notification items into a single toolGroup, discarding notifications silently.
session?.childSessionIds.map() crashes if childSessionIds is undefined (stale API response); must use session?.childSessionIds?.map() with optional chaining on the field itself.

@react-navigation/stack renders screens in absolute-positioned divs; flex:1 inside resolves to 0 height on web. Fix: useWindowDimensions().height - useHeaderHeight() for explicit pixel height + overflow:'scroll' on a plain View.
COL_WIDTHS must be exported from SessionRow and imported into the header row in ActiveSessions to keep columns aligned — header and rows cannot use different sizing strategies.
childSessionIds for GET /api/sessions is computed with a single in-memory pass over the already-fetched sessions (no extra queries); GET /api/sessions/:id uses Promise.all for parallel child query.

workflow: FlatList nested inside a horizontal ScrollView causes scroll ownership conflicts on web — use nested ScrollViews (vertical outer, horizontal inner) instead.
Expo web requires @expo/metro-runtime which is not included by default; install via npx expo install.
react@18.3.2 does not exist on npm; Expo 52 requires 18.3.1.
npx expo install react-native / @expo/metro-runtime resolves version mismatches to Expo-expected versions automatically.
Two separate tsconfigs are required: root (NodeNext for handler/server) and app/ (expo/tsconfig.base) — they must not be merged.
Restarting the API server after a rebuild is necessary when response shapes change; stale servers return old fields causing runtime crashes in the UI.

friction: react@18.3.2 does not exist on npm — wasted install attempt before discovering correct version is 18.3.1.
Missing @expo/metro-runtime blocked Expo web startup with a non-obvious error.

Scrolling required three separate attempts (ScrollView → FlatList → nested ScrollViews) before the root cause was identified: @react-navigation/stack absolute-positioned screen containers collapse flex:1 to 0 height.
EADDRINUSE errors during smoke tests from lingering server processes obscured whether the serve command itself worked.

session?.childSessionIds.map() crash after adding childSessionIds: the optional chaining guarded session being null but not the field being undefined on stale API responses — required both a code fix and a server restart.
open_items: SubagentStart/Stop hooks are not yet configured in settings.json, so subagent sessions are not automatically linked by parentSessionId — relies on the 30s heuristic only.
Full graph/network visualization with a layout library (D3-force or react-vis-network) was mentioned but not implemented — only an indented collapsible tree was added.
The updatedAt-based false-positive time-overlap session link (cd33c72b → f6ec58ae) has not been cleaned up.
Orphaned PostToolUse events (no matching PreToolUse) fall back to plain EventItem rendering — no dedicated handling.
Notification events are silently dropped when isolated between important events — may want a count badge or collapsible indicator instead.
